main_header.subtitle_l10n: How Acme Corp uses Elastic to power real-time analytics

introduction.paragraph_l10n: Acme Corp processes millions of events per day and needed a scalable solution for real-time analytics and monitoring.

challenge_solution.paragraph_l10n: The existing solution could not handle the growing data volume and lacked real-time capabilities.
By deploying Elastic, Acme Corp achieved sub-second query times across petabytes of data.

title_text.paragraph_l10n: The engineering team integrated Elasticsearch into their data pipeline within weeks.

quote.quote_l10n: Elastic transformed how we approach observability and analytics.

seo.seo_description_l10n: Learn how Acme Corp uses Elastic for real-time analytics.
